children.heading: .—Requirement
children.label: 1 .—Requirement
children.text: The program manager for a major defense acquisition program (other than a program not required to be included in the Selected Acquisition Report for that quarter under ) shall, on a quarterly basis, submit to the service acquisition executive designated by the Secretary concerned a written report on the unit costs of the program (or of each designated major subprogram under the program).section 4351(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: .—Time for submittal
children.label: 2 .—Time for submittal
children.text: Each report shall be submitted not more than 30 calendar days after the end of that quarter.

children.heading: .—Matter to Be Included in Unit Cost Reports
children.label: b .—Matter to Be Included in Unit Cost Reports

children.text: The program acquisition unit cost for the program (or for each designated major subprogram under the program).
In the case of a procurement program, the procurement unit cost for the program (or for each designated major subprogram under the program).
Any cost variance or schedule variance in a major contract under the program since the contract was entered into.

Any changes from program schedule milestones or program performances reflected in the baseline description established under that are known, expected, or anticipated by the program manager.section 4214 of this title

Any significant changes in the total program cost for development and procurement of the software component of the program or subprogram, schedule milestones for the software component of the program or subprogram, or expected performance for the software component of the program or subprogram that are known, expected, or anticipated by the program manager.
